name: property-management-residential
description: Residential property management specialist team — 4 agents covering the full leasing and tenant lifecycle (leasing-strategist), maintenance and work-order operations (maintenance-operations-analyst), rent collection and delinquency management (pm-ops-lead), and fair-housing / screening / habitability compliance (pm-compliance-advisor). Ships 3 skills (leasing-and-tenant-lifecycle, maintenance-and-work-orders, rent-collection-and-delinquency), 3 commands, 2 templates, a decision-tree knowledge bank, 6 best-practice rules, and an advisory hook flagging fair-housing language, tenant PII, inconsistent screening, and work orders lacking SLAs. Includes a stdlib calculator for occupancy, NOI, delinquency rate, turn cost, and rent-to-income ratio. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
